summary: Comprehensive testing completed for Hodler Inn hotel management system. All core functionality working correctly including guest flows (registration, check-in, check-out) and admin dashboard with Excel export capability.

ui_bugs.issue: Modal overlay blocks other UI interactions when signature dialog is open - clicking export button fails due to dialog overlay interception
ui_bugs.workaround: Close signature modal before attempting other actions

passed_tests: Frontend registration form with signature canvas
Frontend check-in form with date/time pickers

success_percentage.frontend: 95% (19/20 tests passed - 1 minor modal overlay issue)
